title: [Apache Flink 1.5.2 Released](</2018/07/31/apache-flink-1.5.2-released/>)
summary:
#  Apache Flink 1.5.2 Released
July 31, 2018 -
The Apache Flink community released the second bugfix version of the Apache Flink 1.5 series.
This release includes more than 20 fixes and minor improvements for Flink 1.5.1. The list below inc…
